Class NativeSIMDLinearAlgebraBackend

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.backends.NativeSIMDLinearAlgebraBackend
All Implemented Interfaces:
LinearAlgebraProvider<Real>, AlgorithmProvider, Backend, ComputeBackend, CPUBackend, SIMDBackend, NativeBackend
@AutoService({Backend.class,ComputeBackend.class,NativeBackend.class,LinearAlgebraProvider.class,CPUBackend.class,SIMDBackend.class}) public class NativeSIMDLinearAlgebraBackend extends Object implements LinearAlgebraProvider<Real>, NativeBackend, CPUBackend, SIMDBackend
SIMD-accelerated Linear Algebra Backend for Real numbers using JDK Vector API.
Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    Returns the unique identifier for this backend (e.g., "javafx", "jmol", "cuda").

    Returns the name of the native library this backend depends on.

    Priority of this provider (higher means more preferred).

    Returns the backend type category (e.g., "plotting", "molecular", "tensor", "math").

    • createContext

      public ExecutionContext createContext()
      Description copied from interface: ComputeBackend
      Creates an execution context for running operations.

      The context should be used within a try-with-resources block to ensure proper cleanup of resources.

      Specified by:
      createContext in interface ComputeBackend
      Returns:
      new execution context

    • getSimdLevel

      public String getSimdLevel()
      Description copied from interface: SIMDBackend
      Returns the SIMD instruction set level available.

      Examples: "AVX2", "AVX-512", "NEON", "SVE", "GENERIC"

      Specified by:
      getSimdLevel in interface SIMDBackend

    • getPreferredVectorWidth

      public int getPreferredVectorWidth()
      Description copied from interface: SIMDBackend
      Returns the preferred vector width in bytes for double operations.

      Typical values: 32 (AVX2), 64 (AVX-512), 16 (NEON)

      Specified by:
      getPreferredVectorWidth in interface SIMDBackend

      Description copied from interface: AlgorithmProvider
